changelog: Schema-version fast-path: persisted `Setting[schema_version]` marker short-circuits Migrate() when on-disk schema equals SchemaVersionCurrent. Eliminates per-command 'Migrating ...' spam; legacy DBs read 0 and run the full pipeline once.
`gitmap db-migrate --force` clears the schema_version marker before Migrate() so the full v15 pipeline re-runs without paying the cost of a full db-reset.
Post-update force-migrate: runPostUpdateMigrate now clears the marker before Migrate() so a freshly-swapped binary always re-walks the full pipeline once.

Fixed run.ps1 last-release detector: Get-LastRelease.ps1 now treats the deployed binary's `version` output as the authoritative source, resets `$Matches` between regex calls, reads `.gitmap/release/latest.json` first (legacy `.release/latest.json` fallback), and only prints strict `vX.Y.Z` (otherwise `unknown`).

`gitmap install clean-code` (aliases: code-guide, cg, cc) installs the alimtvnetwork coding-guidelines (v15) by piping the published install.ps1 through PowerShell with -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass.
Tab-completion exposure for clean-code/code-guide/cc via a new `// gitmap:cmd top-level` block in gitmap/constants/constants_cleancode.go.
New: gitmap/cmd/installcleancode.go - cleanCodeAliases, isCleanCodeAlias, runInstallCleanCode, resolvePowerShellBinary.
Edited: gitmap/store/store.go - Migrate() short-circuits via isSchemaUpToDate; stamps marker LAST on success.
Edited: gitmap/constants/constants_settings.go - SettingSchemaVersion, SchemaVersionCurrent (with bump policy), schema-version log strings.
Edited: gitmap/cmd/dbmigrate.go - parseDBMigrateFlags returns (verbose, force); clearSchemaVersionMarker helper; runPostUpdateMigrate force-clears before Migrate.
Edited: gitmap/constants/constants_dbmigrate.go - FlagDBMigrateForce, FlagDescDBMigrateF, MsgDBMigrateForceClear, WarnDBMigrateForceClear.
Edited: gitmap/scripts/Get-LastRelease.ps1 - binary `version` is authoritative; .gitmap/release/latest.json checked first; strict semver guard.
Edited: gitmap/cmd/install.go - validateToolName / executeInstall short-circuit through isCleanCodeAlias.
